Overview Memory Map 40bit.\n40-bit Master Description: HSE Shared RAM (application core access to this HSE region alone is allowed)
Overview Memory Map 40bit.32-bit Master Description \n(except Cort: HSE Shared RAM (application core access to this HSE region alone is allowed)
Overview Memory Map 40bit.\nM7 Description: HSE Shared RAM (application core access to this HSE region alone is allowed)
Overview Memory Map 40bit.HSE M7 description: HSE Shared RAM (application core access to this HSE region alone is allowed)

Overview Memory Map 40bit.Start address (hex): External DRAM  (Please see "Note" at the end of tab to understand keywords - 'Mode 1+1' and 'Mode 2+0')

Note: 
- 'mode 1+1' means two DDR controllers exist in the SoC
- 'mode 2+0' means only one DDR controller exists in the SoC
Overview Memory Map 40bit.End address (hex):
Note :
-Refer to the System RAM Controller (SRAMC) chapter of the RM for details on SRAM and M7 availability across the S32G3 product family

Peripheral Group 0-3.Peripheral description: GPR (SRC,CM7_GPRs, A53_GPR, SERDES_GPRs, DDR_GPR, SRC_GPR, Boot_CC, S32G_GPR, S32G_STDBY_GPR)
